editorial_accuracy.notes: 79 evidence blocks (up from 46). 17 new structured evidence blocks from inline markers. Epilogue + Ch25 sources fixed (21 malformed sources replaced with proper citations). 159 hyphenated line breaks fixed. 24 PDF boilerplate blocks removed. 54 inline markers remain in text blocks (embedded mid-text, need splitting).

information_design.notes: No regression. 12 new proper heading blocks from spaced P A R T headers. All spaced PDF text cleaned (0 remaining). Content hierarchy improved.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Evidence blocks now render correctly across more chapters. Heading blocks provide proper visual hierarchy. No typography regressions.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. Clean build every commit. Chapters bundle: 196.33KB → 192.91KB gzip (-3.4KB of boilerplate removed).

accessibility.notes: No regression. New evidence blocks use semantic HTML with proper tier labeling.

security.notes: No regressions. No new attack surface.
